title: Knights of Old Group ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Knights of Old Group offers full-load, solo and multi-cargo shipping to all parts of the UK and the EU. Delivering freight when you're a knight is not as convenient. Perhaps knight's honor prevented them from contacting us to discuss their data we got fromtheir network. We will share their corporate information here. There is also a database with customers data. Everything will be uploaded soon.
